```
1	# Implementation Peer Review Round 1 Remediation
2	
3	- Decision: incorporated all blockers.
4	- Incorporated: `B-001`.
5	- Deferred: `R-001`, `R-002`, `R-003`, `N-001`, `N-002`, `N-003`, `N-004`.
6	- Rationale for deferral: the continuation selected the blocker-remediation path for closing round 002. The risks and nits are recorded in `impl-review-summary-round1.md` and remain available for a future selected batch; they are not required to close the high-severity blocker.
7	
8	## Incorporated Items
9	
10	- `B-001`: direct-room missing-detail copy now mirrors the round-001 thread copy pattern and no longer uses `AGH` as the subject of the error.
11	
12	## Files Changed
13	
14	- `web/src/systems/network/components/directs/direct-room.tsx`
15	- `web/src/systems/network/components/directs/direct-room.test.tsx`
16	- `.compozy/tasks/network-threads/reviews-002/issue_001.md`
17	
18	## Verification
19	
20	- Targeted: `bunx vitest run web/src/systems/network/components/directs/direct-room.test.tsx`
21	  - Outcome: PASS, `1 passed` file and `5 passed` tests.
22	- Full gate: `make verify 2>&1 | tee .compozy/tasks/network-threads/reviews-002/verify-after-fix.log`
23	  - Executed: 2026-05-05.
24	  - Outcome: PASS.
25	  - Evidence summary: Bun lint `Found 0 warnings and 0 errors`; Vitest `355 passed` files and `2223 passed` tests; Web build completed; Go lint `0 issues`; Go tests `DONE 8401 tests`; boundaries `OK: all package boundaries respected`.
26	
```

```
1	# Implementation Peer Review Round 1 Summary
2	
3	- Verdict: `FIX_BEFORE_SHIP`
4	- Blockers: 1
5	- Risks: 3
6	- Nits: 4
7	
8	## Blockers
9	
10	- `B-001` — `web/src/systems/network/components/direct-room.tsx:86`: missing-direct error copy still uses `AGH could not load ...` while the matching missing-thread copy was corrected in round 001. Fix by changing the direct-room copy to `Could not load direct room ${directId}. Choose an existing direct room from #${channel}.`, updating any matching test expectation, and rerunning `make verify`.
11	
12	## Risks
13	
14	- `R-001` — `internal/store/sessiondb/session_db.go:350`: `Query` / `QueryHookRuns` hold `acceptMu.RLock()` through SQL query and row scan, changing shutdown latency semantics for `Close()`.
15	- `R-002` — `internal/session/query.go:167`: second `waitForSessionFinalization` branch lacks a comment and direct behavior coverage.
16	- `R-003` — `web/src/systems/network/hooks/use-direct-room.ts:46`: `isMessagesLoading` no longer reflects detail-resolution loading for future consumers; same concern applies to `use-thread-overlay.ts:48`.
17	
18	## Nits
19	
20	- `N-001` — `internal/session/query_test.go:477`: subtest name overstates the assertion.
21	- `N-002` — `internal/session/query_test.go:486`: cleanup uses `_ = h.manager.Stop(...)` without a written justification.
22	- `N-003` — `internal/store/sessiondb/session_db_extra_test.go:42`: new post-close `Query` assertion is not in its own `t.Run("Should ...")` subtest.
23	- `N-004` — `web/src/systems/network/components/empty-states/conversation-error.tsx:16`: default `testId` appears unused because all call sites pass an explicit value.
24	
25	## Artifacts
26	
27	- Raw stream: `.compozy/tasks/network-threads/reviews-002/peer-review/impl-review-result-round1.json`
28	- Extracted output: `.compozy/tasks/network-threads/reviews-002/peer-review/impl-review-output-round1.md`
29	- Findings JSON: `.compozy/tasks/network-threads/reviews-002/peer-review/impl-review-findings-round1.json`
30	- Prompt: `.compozy/tasks/network-threads/reviews-002/peer-review/impl-review-prompt-round1.md`
31	- Patch: `.compozy/tasks/network-threads/reviews-002/peer-review/impl-review-diff-round1.patch`
32	
```

```
1	---
2	provider: cy-impl-peer-review
3	pr: local-uncommitted
4	round: 2
5	round_created_at: 2026-05-05T18:30:17Z
6	status: resolved
7	file: web/src/systems/network/components/directs/direct-room.tsx
8	line: 86
9	severity: high
10	author: cy-codex-loop
11	provider_ref: B-001
12	---
13	
14	# Issue 001: Implementation peer review blocker
15	
16	## Review Comment
17	
18	The missing-direct error copy still says `AGH could not load ${directId}. Chose an existing direct room from #${channel}.` while the structurally identical missing-thread copy at `thread-overlay.tsx:34` was just reworked to drop the `AGH` prefix in the round-001 remediation. The diff therefore ships two contradictory phrasings for the same UX state on adjacent surfaces.
19	
20	## Rationale
21	
22	Round-001 issue 001 explicitly classified the `AGH ...` wording as a `COPY.md` violation and called for the description to use the failed resource as the subject. The triage applies to `direct-room.tsx` because it uses the same `ConversationError` pattern and the same operator action. Shipping the fix on only one of the two matching surfaces leaves the copy hard cut incomplete.
23	
24	## Suggested Fix
25	
26	In `direct-room.tsx`, replace the description with `Could not load direct room ${directId}. Choose an existing direct room from #${channel}.`, update the corresponding direct-room test expectation if it asserts the description text, and rerun `make verify`.
27	
28	## Triage
29	
30	- Decision: `VALID`
31	- Notes: The direct-room missing-detail state uses the same `ConversationError` pattern and operator action as the thread missing-detail state fixed in round 001. `COPY.md` requires Web UI microcopy to tell the operator what is true and what action is available; using the product acronym as the subject adds implementation/product naming noise without clarifying the state.
32	- Root cause: the round-001 copy fix removed `AGH` only from the thread detail error path and missed the parallel direct-room error path.
33	- Fix approach: update the direct-room error description to use `Could not load direct room ${directId}. Choose an existing direct room from #${channel}.`, then add a test assertion for the description and run the full repository gate.
34	- Resolution: updated `web/src/systems/network/components/directs/direct-room.tsx` to render `Could not load direct room ${directId}. Choose an existing direct room from #${channel}.` and updated `web/src/systems/network/components/directs/direct-room.test.tsx` to assert the description text.
35	- Verification: `bunx vitest run web/src/systems/network/components/directs/direct-room.test.tsx` exited 0 with `1 passed` file and `5 passed` tests. `make verify 2>&1 | tee .compozy/tasks/network-threads/reviews-002/verify-after-fix.log` exited 0; Bun lint reported `Found 0 warnings and 0 errors`; Vitest reported `355 passed` files and `2223 passed` tests; Web build completed; Go lint reported `0 issues`; Go tests reported `DONE 8401 tests`; boundaries reported `OK: all package boundaries respected`.
36	
```
